title: Migrate helpers import from LiveView.Helpers to Phoenix.Component
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/legacy.ex (module MyAppWeb.Components.Legacy) that imports Phoenix.Component — NOT Phoenix.LiveView.Helpers. Define button/1 and link/1 function components. Do not use any helper from Phoenix.LiveView.Helpers. The ~H sigil must be the current one.
tier_rationale: LLMs often still import the deprecated Phoenix.LiveView.Helpers.
research_citation: fly.io Migrating to LiveView v0.18: 'import Phoenix.Component and remove the Phoenix.LiveView.Helpers import'
